Desc_Stone_C.name: Vápenec
Desc_Stone_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. A basic resource primarily used for stable Foundations.

Desc_OreIron_C.name: Železná ruda
Desc_OreIron_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Najzákladnejší prírodný zdroj.

Desc_OreCopper_C.name: Medená ruda
Desc_OreCopper_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. A basic resource primarily used for electricity.

Desc_OreGold_C.name: Catériová ruda
Desc_OreGold_C.description: Smelted into Caterium Ingots, which are primarily used for advanced electronics.

Desc_Coal_C.name: Uhlie
Desc_Coal_C.description: Mainly used as fuel for vehicles & Coal-Powered Generators, or in Steel production.

Desc_RawQuartz_C.name: Surový kremeň
Desc_RawQuartz_C.description: Can be processed into Quartz Crystals and Silica, which both offer a variety of applications.

Desc_Sulfur_C.name: Síra
Desc_Sulfur_C.description: Primarily used to produce Black Powder.

Desc_OreBauxite_C.name: Bauxit
Desc_OreBauxite_C.description: Used to produce Alumina, which can be further refined into the Aluminum Scrap required to produce Aluminum Ingots.

Desc_SAM_C.name: ZMK
Desc_SAM_C.description: Strange Alien Matter, commonly referred to as SAM, doesn't seem to follow the known laws of physics. It whispers of new possibilities.

Desc_OreUranium_C.name: Urán
Desc_OreUranium_C.description: A radioactive element. Used to produce Encased Uranium Cells for Uranium Fuel Rods. Pozor: Stredne rádioaktívny.

Desc_IronIngot_C.name: Ingot železa
Desc_IronIngot_C.description: Used for crafting the most basic parts.

Desc_CopperIngot_C.name: Ingot medi
Desc_CopperIngot_C.description: Used for crafting the most basic parts.

Desc_GoldIngot_C.name: Ingot catéria
Desc_GoldIngot_C.description: Smelted from Caterium Ore. Primarily used for advanced electronics.

Desc_SteelIngot_C.name: Ingot ocele
Desc_SteelIngot_C.description: Smelted from a combination of Iron Ore and Coal. Can be made into several parts used in building construction.

Desc_AluminumIngot_C.name: Ingot hliníka
Desc_AluminumIngot_C.description: Smelted from Aluminum Scrap, which is refined from Alumina Solution. Používa sa na výrobu špeciálnych dielov na báze hliníka.

Desc_FicsiteIngot_C.name: Ficsite Ingot
Desc_FicsiteIngot_C.description: Produced by reconstructing other metals on a molecular level using Strange Alien Matter. Synthesized by FICSIT to be the perfect construction material, and used in the most high-end processes.

Desc_Cement_C.name: Betón
Desc_Cement_C.description: Používa sa na stavbu. Vhodné pre stabilné základy.

Desc_QuartzCrystal_C.name: Kryštál kremeňa
Desc_QuartzCrystal_C.description: Získava sa zo surového kremeňa. Používa sa pri výrobe pokročilej radarovej technológie a vysokokvalitných obrazoviek.

Desc_Silica_C.name: Kremenný piesok
Desc_Silica_C.description: Derived from Raw Quartz. Commonly used to create glass structures, in advanced refinement processes, and for alternative production of electronics.

Desc_CopperDust_C.name: Medený prach
Desc_CopperDust_C.description: Ground-up Copper Ingots. The high natural density of Copper, combined with the granularity of the powder, makes this part perfect for producing Nuclear Pasta in the Particle Accelerator.

Desc_PolymerResin_C.name: Polymérna živica
Desc_PolymerResin_C.description: A by-product of Crude Oil refinement into Fuel. Commonly used to manufacture Plastic and Rubber.

Desc_PetroleumCoke_C.name: Ropný koks
Desc_PetroleumCoke_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Materiál bohatý na uhlík destilovaný zo zvyškov ťažkej ropy. Používa sa ako menej účinná náhrada uhlia.

Desc_AluminumScrap_C.name: Hliníkový šrot
Desc_AluminumScrap_C.description: Refined from Alumina. Can be smelted into Aluminum Ingots for industrial usage.

Desc_AlienProtein_C.name: Mimozemská bielkovina
Desc_AlienProtein_C.description: Ground-up Alien Remains in a neat little package. Používa sa na lekárske účely a na výskum cudzích organizmov.

Desc_AlienDNACapsule_C.name: Kapsula mimozemskej DNA
Desc_AlienDNACapsule_C.description: Translates organic chemicals into readable alien genetic information. Used for researching alien organisms. Go the extra kilometer! Knowledge is power, and power is just efficiency with fewer steps. Depositing Alien DNA Capsules in the AWESOME Sink provides FICSIT with knowledge, and pioneers with Coupons.

Desc_LiquidOil_C.name: Surová ropa
Desc_LiquidOil_C.description: Refined into all kinds of Oil-based resources, like Fuel and Plastic.

Desc_HeavyOilResidue_C.name: Zvyšková ťažká ropa
Desc_HeavyOilResidue_C.description: Vedľajší produkt pri výrobe plastov a gumy. Môže sa ďalej rafinovať na palivo a ropný koks.

Desc_LiquidFuel_C.name: Palivo
Desc_LiquidFuel_C.description: Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

Desc_LiquidBiofuel_C.name: Tekuté biopalivo
Desc_LiquidBiofuel_C.description: Liquid Biofuel can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.

Desc_LiquidTurboFuel_C.name: Turbopalivo
Desc_LiquidTurboFuel_C.description: A more efficient alternative to Fuel. Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.

Desc_AluminaSolution_C.name: Roztok oxidu hlinitého
Desc_AluminaSolution_C.description: Rozpustený oxid hlinitý extrahovaný z bauxitu. Môže sa ďalej rafinovať na hliníkový šrot na výrobu hliníkových ingotov.

Desc_SulfuricAcid_C.name: Kyselina sírová
Desc_SulfuricAcid_C.description: Produced by combining Sulfur and Water in a complex reaction. Primarily used in refinement processes and Battery production.

Desc_NitricAcid_C.name: Kyselina dusičná
Desc_NitricAcid_C.description: Produced when Nitrogen Gas reacts with Water. Its high corrosiveness and oxidizing properties make it an excellent choice for refinement and fuel production processes.

Desc_DissolvedSilica_C.name: Dissolved Silica
Desc_DissolvedSilica_C.description: Silica dissolved in Water, produced as part of the alternative refinement of Raw Quartz. The Silica can be extracted from the Water to complete the refinement process.

Desc_NitrogenGas_C.name: Plynný dusík
Desc_NitrogenGas_C.description: Has a variety of uses, including metallurgy, cooling, and Nitric Acid production. On MASSAGE-2 (AB)b, it can be extracted from underground gas wells.

Desc_RocketFuel_C.name: Rocket Fuel
Desc_RocketFuel_C.description: A high-impulse compressed gas fuel. Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

Desc_IonizedFuel_C.name: Ionized Fuel
Desc_IonizedFuel_C.description: Fuel that has been ionized, allowing it to deliver incredible output. Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

Desc_DarkEnergy_C.name: Dark Matter Residue
Desc_DarkEnergy_C.description: Produced as a by-product of Quantum Encoding processes and alternatively generated in the Converter. Various fields of science are still debating the nature and properties of Dark Matter. Meanwhile, FICSIT has found several applications for it in space-time manipulation.

Desc_QuantumEnergy_C.name: Excited Photonic Matter
Desc_QuantumEnergy_C.description: Excited Photonic Matter is essential for all production processes in the Quantum Encoder. Formed in the Converter by inducing intense photon interactions through exposure to SAM in a high-energy environment.

Desc_IronRod_C.name: Železná tyč
Desc_IronRod_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Jeden zo základných dielov.

Desc_IronScrew_C.name: Skrutka
Desc_IronScrew_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Jeden zo základných dielov.

Desc_IronPlate_C.name: Železný plát
Desc_IronPlate_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Jeden zo základných dielov.

Desc_IronPlateReinforced_C.name: Spevnený železný plát
Desc_IronPlateReinforced_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Pevnejší a odolnejší železný plát.

Desc_CopperSheet_C.name: Medený plech
Desc_CopperSheet_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Primarily used for pipelines due to its high corrosion resistance.

Desc_AluminumPlate_C.name: Duralový plech
Desc_AluminumPlate_C.description: Used to make products that require high heat conduction or a high specific strength. Thin, lightweight, and highly durable.

Desc_AluminumCasing_C.name: Hliníkové puzdro
Desc_AluminumCasing_C.description: A versatile container cast from Aluminum Ingots.

Desc_SteelPipe_C.name: Oceľová rúra
Desc_SteelPipe_C.description: Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.

Desc_SteelPlate_C.name: Oceľový nosník
Desc_SteelPlate_C.description: Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.

Desc_SteelPlateReinforced_C.name: Železobetónový nosník
Desc_SteelPlateReinforced_C.description: Simultaneously utilizes the compressive strength of concrete and the tensile strength of steel. Mostly used as a stable base for constructing buildings.

Desc_ModularFrame_C.name: Modulárny rám
Desc_ModularFrame_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. A multipurpose building block.

Desc_ModularFrameFused_C.name: Zváraný modulárny rám
Desc_ModularFrameFused_C.description: A corrosion-resistant, nitride-hardened, highly-robust-yet-lightweight modular frame.

Desc_FicsiteMesh_C.name: Ficsite Trigon
Desc_FicsiteMesh_C.description: The Ficsite Trigon, made from Ficsite Ingots, is perfectly shaped for all construction challenges. Its performance is so exceptional, it basically solved structural engineering.

Desc_Fabric_C.name: Textil
Desc_Fabric_C.description: Used to craft equipment. Flexible but durable fabric.

Desc_Plastic_C.name: Plast
Desc_Plastic_C.description: Versatile and easy to manufacture, this material has a wide range of uses.

Desc_Rubber_C.name: Guma
Desc_Rubber_C.description: A very flexible material that has a lot of friction.

Desc_Rotor_C.name: Rotor
Desc_Rotor_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Otáčavá časť motora.

Desc_Stator_C.name: Stator
Desc_Stator_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Statická súčasť motora.

Desc_Battery_C.name: Batéria
Desc_Battery_C.description: Používa sa predovšetkým ako palivo pre drony a vozidlá.

Desc_Motor_C.name: Motor
Desc_Motor_C.description: Creates a mechanical force that is used to move things from machines to vehicles.

Desc_CoolingSystem_C.name: Chladiaci systém
Desc_CoolingSystem_C.description: Keeps advanced parts and buildings from exceeding efficient temperature levels.

Desc_MotorLightweight_C.name: Turbomotor
Desc_MotorLightweight_C.description: A more complex and powerful version of the regular Motor.

Desc_Wire_C.name: Drôt
Desc_Wire_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Jeden zo základných dielov.

Desc_Cable_C.name: Kábel
Desc_Cable_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Primarily used to build power lines.

Desc_HighSpeedWire_C.name: Rýchlodrôt
Desc_HighSpeedWire_C.description: Caterium's high conductivity and resistance to corrosion make it ideal for small, advanced electronics.

Desc_CircuitBoard_C.name: Doska plošných spojov
Desc_CircuitBoard_C.description: Advanced electronics that have a plethora of different uses.

Desc_CircuitBoardHighSpeed_C.name: Obmedzovač AI
Desc_CircuitBoardHighSpeed_C.description: Controls AIs and keeps them from evolving in malicious ways. Super advanced electronics.

Desc_HighSpeedConnector_C.name: Vysokorýchlostný konektor
Desc_HighSpeedConnector_C.description: Connects multiple cables and wires in a very efficient way. Uses a standard pattern, so it has many varied applications.

Desc_SAMIngot_C.name: Reanimated SAM
Desc_SAMIngot_C.description: The active and contained form of the Strange Alien Matter. Proper electromagnetic containment is required, as it appears to be able to manipulate the atomic bonds of any matter it comes into contact with.

Desc_SAMFluctuator_C.name: SAM Fluctuator
Desc_SAMFluctuator_C.description: The SAM Fluctuator is able to regulate and direct the behavior of Reanimated SAM through the application of electric charges with varying frequencies. This control facilitates technologies such as matter-to-energy conversion and spatiotemporal matter manipulation.

Desc_Computer_C.name: Počítač
Desc_Computer_C.description: A complex logic machine that is used to control advanced behavior in other machines.

Desc_ComputerSuper_C.name: Superpočítač
Desc_ComputerSuper_C.description: The next-gen version of a Computer.

Desc_CrystalOscillator_C.name: Kryštálový oscilátor
Desc_CrystalOscillator_C.description: An electronic oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create an electrical signal with a precise frequency.

Desc_QuantumOscillator_C.name: Superpozičný oscilátor
Desc_QuantumOscillator_C.description: An oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create a string vibration with a precise frequency. Often used in teleportation technology and dimensional manipulation.

Desc_Diamond_C.name: Diamonds
Desc_Diamond_C.description: Synthetic Diamonds produced by exposing Coal to extreme heat and pressure. Used in the production of Time Crystals and Dark Matter Crystals. Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average).

Desc_TimeCrystal_C.name: Time Crystal
Desc_TimeCrystal_C.description: Time Crystals are Diamonds that have been reconfigured on a sub-atomic level in the Converter to retain a time-periodic self-organizing structure. This allows them to be used in the development of quantum processing and storage technologies.

Desc_DarkMatter_C.name: Dark Matter Crystal
Desc_DarkMatter_C.description: Concentrated Dark Matter Residue that is isolated within a crystalline vessel. This form of containment allows for utilising Dark Matter reliably in other production processes. Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average).

Desc_SingularityCell_C.name: Singularity Cell
Desc_SingularityCell_C.description: Used to break down space and time. Required to power Portals.

Desc_TemporalProcessor_C.name: Neural-Quantum Processor
Desc_TemporalProcessor_C.description: The Neural-Quantum Processor utilizes a combination of neural network architecture and quantum computing techniques to achieve unprecedented performance. This technology has enabled some of FICSIT's biggest advancements in artificial intelligence and relativistic engineering.

Desc_AlienPowerFuel_C.name: Alien Power Matrix
Desc_AlienPowerFuel_C.description: This intricate condensed-matter matrix is used to enhance the output of the Alien Power Augmenter. Initially developed in efforts to create a human-made Somersloop, the Alien Power Matrix cannot sustain the extra-dimensional energy connection on its own. However, it can effectively stabilize the energy stream of the Somersloop.

Desc_FluidCanister_C.name: Prázdny kanister
Desc_FluidCanister_C.description: Slúži na balenie tekutín pre prepravu.

Desc_GasTank_C.name: Prádzna fľaša na tekutiny
Desc_GasTank_C.description: Used to package gases and volatile liquids for transportation.

Desc_PressureConversionCube_C.name: Kocka na konverziu tlaku
Desc_PressureConversionCube_C.description: Converts outgoing force into internal pressure. Required to contain unstable, high-energy matter.

Desc_PackagedAlumina_C.name: Balený roztok oxidu hlinitého
Desc_PackagedAlumina_C.description: Alumina Solution, packaged for alternative transport.

Desc_PackagedSulfuricAcid_C.name: Balená kyselina sírová
Desc_PackagedSulfuricAcid_C.description: Sulfuric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.

Desc_PackagedNitricAcid_C.name: Balená kyselina dusičná
Desc_PackagedNitricAcid_C.description: Nitric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.

Desc_PackagedNitrogenGas_C.name: Balený dusík
Desc_PackagedNitrogenGas_C.description: Nitrogen Gas, packaged for alternative transport.

Desc_Leaves_C.name: Lístie
Desc_Leaves_C.description: Primarily used as fuel. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Leaves for power.

Desc_Mycelia_C.name: Podhubie
Desc_Mycelia_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Biomass Burners and vehicles can also use Mycelia for power.

Desc_FlowerPetals_C.name: Flower Petals
Desc_FlowerPetals_C.description: Slúži na výrobu. Farebné okvetné lístky pôvodných kvetov.

Desc_Wood_C.name: Drevo
Desc_Wood_C.description: Primarily used as fuel. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Wood for power.

Desc_GenericBiomass_C.name: Biomasa
Desc_GenericBiomass_C.description: Primarily used as fuel. Spaľovače biomasy a vozidlá ju môžu využívať na výrobu energie. Biomasa je energeticky oveľa účinnejšia ako surová biologická hmota.

Desc_CompactedCoal_C.name: Lisované uhlie
Desc_CompactedCoal_C.description: A much more efficient alternative to Coal. Used as fuel for vehicles and Coal-Powered Generators.

Desc_PackagedOil_C.name: Balená ropa
Desc_PackagedOil_C.description: Surová ropa, balená na alternatívnu prepravu. Môže sa použiť ako palivo pre vozidlá.

Desc_PackagedOilResidue_C.name: Balená zvyšová ťažká ropa
Desc_PackagedOilResidue_C.description: Zvyšky ťažkého oleja, balené pre alternatívnu prepravu. Môže sa použiť ako palivo pre vozidlá.

Desc_Biofuel_C.name: Tuhé biopalivo
Desc_Biofuel_C.description: Energeticky najúčinnejšia forma pevnej biomasy. Môže sa použiť ako palivo pre motorovú pílu.

Desc_Fuel_C.name: Balené palivo
Desc_Fuel_C.description: Palivo balené pre alternatívnu prepravu. Môže sa použiť ako palivo pre vozidlá a jetpack.

Desc_PackagedBiofuel_C.name: Balené tekuté biopalivo
Desc_PackagedBiofuel_C.description: Kvapalné biopalivo balené na alternatívnu prepravu. Môže sa použiť ako palivo pre vozidlá a jetpack.

Desc_TurboFuel_C.name: Balené turbopalivo
Desc_TurboFuel_C.description: Turbo-palivo, balené pre alternatívnu prepravu. Môže sa použiť ako palivo pre vozidlá a jetpack.

Desc_PackagedRocketFuel_C.name: Packaged Rocket Fuel
Desc_PackagedRocketFuel_C.description: Rocket Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

Desc_PackagedIonizedFuel_C.name: Packaged Ionized Fuel
Desc_PackagedIonizedFuel_C.description: Ionized Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

Desc_NuclearFuelRod_C.name: Uránová palivová tyč
Desc_NuclearFuelRod_C.description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants. Pozor: Pri konzumácii vzniká rádioaktívny uránový odpad. Pozor: Stredne rádioaktívny.

Desc_PlutoniumFuelRod_C.name: Plutóniová palivová tyč
Desc_PlutoniumFuelRod_C.description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants. Pozor: Pri požití vytvára rádioaktívny plutóniový odpad. Pozor: VYSOKO rádioaktívne.

Desc_Gunpowder_C.name: Pušný prach
Desc_Gunpowder_C.description: An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce simple explosives.

Desc_GunpowderMK2_C.name: Bezdymový pušný prach
Desc_GunpowderMK2_C.description: An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce modern firearms.

Desc_Filter_C.name: Plynový filter
Desc_Filter_C.description: Filters out toxins and pollutants from the air when used with a Gas Mask.

Desc_ColorCartridge_C.name: Color Cartridge
Desc_ColorCartridge_C.description: Used for applying Patterns to structures with the Customizer. (Patterns can be purchased in the AWESOME Shop.)

BP_EquipmentDescriptorBeacon_C.name: Beacon
BP_EquipmentDescriptorBeacon_C.description: PENDING REMOVAL This item will (likely) be removed in a future update. Currently only used as an ingredient in an alternative recipe.

Desc_HazmatFilter_C.name: Iodine-Infused Filter
Desc_HazmatFilter_C.description: Absorbs radioactive particles when used with the Hazmat Suit.

Desc_SpikedRebar_C.name: Železný roxor
Desc_SpikedRebar_C.description: Can be shot using the Rebar Gun for self-defense purposes.

Desc_Rebar_Stunshot_C.name: Omračujúci roxor
Desc_Rebar_Stunshot_C.description: Pri náraze cieľ omráči elektrickým prúdom na krátky čas. Trvanie omráčenia: 5 sekúnd

Desc_Rebar_Spreadshot_C.name: Brokový roxor
Desc_Rebar_Spreadshot_C.description: Fractures when shot, launching deadly debris with wide spread but limited range.

Desc_Rebar_Explosive_C.name: Výbušný roxor
Desc_Rebar_Explosive_C.description: Pri náraze vybuchne a spôsobí veľké poškodenie.

Desc_CartridgeStandard_C.name: Strelivo do pušky
Desc_CartridgeStandard_C.description: Bežné strelivo do pušky užitočné na nastolenie prevahy.

Desc_CartridgeSmartProjectile_C.name: Riadené strelivo do pušky
Desc_CartridgeSmartProjectile_C.description: Systém navádzania strely zabudovaný v tejto munícii jej umožňuje presne zasiahnuť akýkoľvek cieľ v oblasti zameriavacieho kríža. Obzvlášť užitočné pri riešení agilných hrozieb alebo pre strelcov, ktorí sa nevedia poriadne mieriť.

Desc_CartridgeChaos_C.name: Turbo strelivo do pušky
Desc_CartridgeChaos_C.description: Lightweight, compact, and volatile. These rounds provide extreme capacity and rate of fire at the cost of accuracy.

Desc_NobeliskExplosive_C.name: Nobelisk
Desc_NobeliskExplosive_C.description: Jednoduchá výbušnina, užitočná na odstraňovanie balvanov, vegetácie a iných prekážok.

Desc_NobeliskGas_C.name: Plynový nobelisk
Desc_NobeliskGas_C.description: Creates a deadly gas cloud instead of a regular explosion.

Desc_NobeliskShockwave_C.name: Tlakový nobelisk
Desc_NobeliskShockwave_C.description: Generates a powerful shockwave instead of a regular explosion.

Desc_NobeliskCluster_C.name: Kazetový nobelisk
Desc_NobeliskCluster_C.description: Detonates into multiple smaller explosions. Practical for clearing out large areas of vegetation and other inconveniences.

Desc_NobeliskNuke_C.name: Jadrový Nobelisk
Desc_NobeliskNuke_C.description: Uses a nuclear fission reaction to generate a massive explosion. VAROVANIE: Pred detonáciou sa uistite, že všetok majetok FICSIT je mimo zóny výbuchu.

Desc_UraniumCell_C.name: Uzavretý uránový článok
Desc_UraniumCell_C.description: Used to produce Uranium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production. Made from Uranium Ore. Caution: Mildly Radioactive.

Desc_NonFissibleUranium_C.name: Non-Fissile Uranium
Desc_NonFissibleUranium_C.description: The Uranium-238 isotope is non-fissile, meaning it cannot be used for nuclear fission. It can, however, be converted into fissile Plutonium in the Particle Accelerator. Caution: Mildly Radioactive.

Desc_PlutoniumPellet_C.name: Plutóniová granula
Desc_PlutoniumPellet_C.description: Produced in the Particle Accelerator through conversion of Non-fissile Uranium. Used to produce Encased Plutonium Cells for Plutonium Fuel Rods. Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average). Pozor: Stredne rádioaktívny.

Desc_PlutoniumCell_C.name: Uzavretý plutóniový článok
Desc_PlutoniumCell_C.description: Plutonium Pellets encased in concrete. Used to produce Plutonium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production. Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average). Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

Desc_Ficsonium_C.name: Ficsonium
Desc_Ficsonium_C.description: Usage and production of this material is strictly prohibited. On Earth, that is. There are no rules in space, only efficiency. Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average). Pozor: Stredne rádioaktívny.

Desc_FicsoniumFuelRod_C.name: Ficsonium Fuel Rod
Desc_FicsoniumFuelRod_C.description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants. The power source that put FICSIT on the map. Literally. The crater is still there. Pozor: Stredne rádioaktívny.

Desc_NuclearWaste_C.name: Uránový odpad
Desc_NuclearWaste_C.description: The by-product of consuming Uranium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant. Neštiepny urán sa dá extrahovať. Zaobchádzajte opatrne. Pozor: VYSOKO rádioaktívne.

Desc_PlutoniumWaste_C.name: Plutoniový odpad
Desc_PlutoniumWaste_C.description: The by-product of consuming Plutonium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant. Must be stored in a safe location. Handle with caution. Pozor: EXTRÉMNE rádioaktívne.

Desc_Crystal_C.name: Modrý elektroslimák
Desc_Crystal_C.description: A strange slug radiating an unknown weak power.

Desc_Crystal_mk2_C.name: Žltý elektroslimák
Desc_Crystal_mk2_C.description: A strange slug radiating an unknown power.

Desc_Crystal_mk3_C.name: Fialový elektroslimák
Desc_Crystal_mk3_C.description: A strange slug radiating a powerful unknown power.

Desc_CrystalShard_C.name: Elektrický úlomok
Desc_CrystalShard_C.description: Power Slug mucus compressed into a solid crystal-like shard. It radiates a strange power.

Desc_ResourceSinkCoupon_C.name: FICSIT kupón
Desc_ResourceSinkCoupon_C.description: A special FICSIT bonus program Coupon, obtained through the AWESOME Sink. Can be redeemed in the AWESOME Shop for bonus milestones and rewards.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_1_C.name: Inteligentné pláty
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_1_C.description: Project Part #1. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_2_C.name: Univerzálna konštrukcia
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_2_C.description: Project Part #2. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_3_C.name: Automatizované vedenie

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_5_C.name: Adaptívna riadiaca jednotka

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_7_C.name: Riadiaci montážny systém
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_7_C.description: Project Part #6. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. This extremely fast and precise computing system is specifically designed to direct the Project Assembly: Assembly Phase.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_6_C.name: Generátor magnetického poľa
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_6_C.description: Project Part #7. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. These modular generators use superconducting magnets and vast amounts of electricity to produce a powerful and easily expandable magnetic field.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_8_C.name: Raketa termálneho pohonu
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_8_C.description: Project Part #8. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Uses extreme heat to produce the high-pressure plasma required to get Project Assembly into motion.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_9_C.name: Jadrové cestoviny
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_9_C.description: Project Part #9. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average). Nuclear Pasta is extremely dense degenerate matter, formed when extreme pressure forces protons and electrons together into neutrons. It is theorized to exist naturally within the crust of neutron stars.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_10_C.name: Biochemical Sculptor
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_10_C.description: Project Part #10. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Years ahead of the competition, this top-of-the-line 3D printer is used for the production of synthetic biological resources.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_11_C.name: Ballistic Warp Drive
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_11_C.description: Project Part #11. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. A large amount of force is required for the Warp Drives to activate, so sticking them to rockets was the logical next step. Additionally, results improved immensely when the observers were further removed from the Warp Drives upon activation.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_12_C.name: AI Expansion Server
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_12_C.description: Project Part #12. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Power Usage: 0-2000 MW (1000 MW average). Growth is the metric by which we measure success.
